title: DIVCHI 2-Pack Serving Tray Set – Non-Slip Lap Boards with Grip Handles, Ideal for Food Prep, Tea, Breakfast in Bed – Plastic Tray for Stable Dining Dishwasher Safe (Grey & White)

amazon_product_details_section.Item model number: 2 x Set of Rectangular Plastic Tray_p

features: Oops how much hassle is it when you’re carrying a round of coffees and they go skating from one end of the tea trays with handles to the other.
White,grey & black color available but random 2 dinner trays will be shipped.
Made from thick plastic, this food tray has an anti-slip underside too, making it ideal as a dinner tray to rest on your lap.
Breakfast tray is comfortable, practical and colourful; look out for matching Colour works items or mix colours to make a fun collection.
The kitchen tray measures 40.5 x 28.5 cm (16 x 11 Inch); it's dishwasher safe; colour may vary to that shown
description: This set of 2x non-slip serving trays features an anti-slip patterned surface to the top and bottom. Non slip trays for eating on lap. Great as a serving tray or a lap tray, with grips on both sides to stop food or cups slipping around and keep the tray on your lap. Breakfast in bed tray. Easy-grip handles makes this drinks serving tray easier to carry with food and drink on the tray.. This non slip trays for eating is ideal for all kitchens, homes or gift Product Dimensions: 5cm x 40.5cm x 28.5cm trays for food serving.
